phases.title: Inciting Incident
phases.description: Opens the conflict and launches the story engine with minimal upfront exposition.

phases.title: Crisis 1
phases.description: First major reversal that raises stakes and forces a new response.

phases.title: Crisis 2
phases.description: Escalation: deeper trouble, tighter options, clearer cost of failure.

phases.title: Crisis 3
phases.description: Another turn that pushes the protagonist toward their limit or a painful truth.

phases.title: Crisis 4
phases.description: Late-stage pressure that sets up the final confrontation or sacrifice.

phases.title: Climax
phases.description: Peak confrontation where the central conflict resolves through action and choice.

phases.title: Aftermath
phases.description: Brief fallout showing consequence, relief, or the price paid after the climax.
